jobs.title: Senior Frontend Engineer - Remote Europe
jobs.location: United Kingdom (+ Poland, United Kingdom, Spain, Netherlands, Portugal, France, Remote)
jobs.rawDescription: Senior Frontend Engineer - Remote Europe We welcome applicants based anywhere in Europe. About Reedsy We’re here to give authors the tools and resources they need to create beautiful books. Our marketplace gathers the industry's best publishing professionals — the likes of Neil Gaiman's editor, Nora Roberts' book marketer, and GRRM’s cover designer. We’ve grown to a community of 5,000,000 authors, and transformed the way people write and publish their book. Want to hop on board and help us get to our next destination? Cool, keep reading! Responsibilities Develop high quality, responsive, mobile-friendly Vue.js apps Create amazing interactions and visualizations Work closely with our Back-end engineers and our UI designers Help bridge the gap between server and client (consuming RESTful APIs) Write unit and functional tests Requirements Professional experience with Vue.js A firm understanding of how to write maintainable and scalable CSS with Sass. Strong JavaScript fundamentals Experience with component-based front-end UI libraries. Understanding of MVC pattern and other object oriented concepts Experience with version control (Git and GitHub) Familiarity with agile development processes Exceptional communication skills Bonus Points A good dose of ambition, as well as a great sense of humour You strive for pixel perfection Experience optimizing JavaScript applications UX skills Knowledge of Node.js, TypeScript, Ruby, Ruby on Rails, Desktop Framework (e.g Electron), iOS Fluent in multiple languages. Reedsy welcomes applicants of all cultures and backgrounds. Benefits Work from home; Paid paternal and maternal leave; Annual team retreat Salary range: €60k – €90k Location: United Kingdom (+ Poland, United Kingdom, Spain, Netherlands, Portugal, France, Remote)

score.reason: Vue.js primary with TypeScript bonus; Spain explicitly in locations and fully remote. Senior-level role with no critical gaps.

jobs.title: Senior Developer FullStack (Vue y Nodejs). Inglés alto.
jobs.rawDescription: ¡Atención, amante de la tecnología! Si eres una persona curiosa, creativa y con pasión por la innovación, ¡esta oportunidad es para ti! En nuestro equipo, buscamos mentes inquietas como la tuya, dispuestas a formar parte de Comunidades tecnológicas donde construir conjuntamente. ¡Prepárate para un viaje emocionante! Pero antes de nada, ¿nos presentamos? Somos atmira, un ecosistema de interacción centrado en las personas. Nuestro objetivo es ayudarte a desarrollarte tanto personal como profesionalmente. A través de nuestro Club, podrás relacionarte, vivir experiencias profesionales y alcanzar tus metas. En atmira, tú eres el protagonista y tienes el poder de explorar tu potencial con #Icouldbe Y ahora que ya nos conocemos un poco más… ¿A qué te vas a dedicar ? Trabajarás en un proyecto junto a uno de nuestros clientes donde podrás realizar desarrollos y dar apoyo técnico al mismo. Tus funciones principales serán las siguientes: • Participar en el análisis funcional de las necesidades del usuario (Kanban/Agile). • Elaborar diseños técnicos basados en especificaciones funcionales. • Analizar y desarrollar componentes utilizando lenguajes definidos e interfaces. • contribuir al desarrollo y la implementación de aplicaciones (prototipos y módulos). • Documentar todo el trabajo de desarrollo, componentes y módulos según los estándares. • Participar en revisiones de código. • Definir protocolos y escenarios de pruebas de integración. • Realizar pruebas, identificar y resolver cualquier problema. • Participar en el mantenimiento correctivo y evolutivo de todas las aplicaciones desarrolladas. • Proponer mejoras durante las reuniones técnicas. Con qué tecnología trabajarás principalmente? Trabajarás con Vue.js, Node.js, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, MVC, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, Linux, TDD, GIT, SCRUM, Kanban. Es necesario un nivel de inglés alto porque es un proyecto internacional. ¿Te resulta interesante? Tenemos más que contarte: Un fantástico equipo de personas que te ayudarán

jobs.title: Blackshark AI — Software Engineers & Platform Engineers
jobs.rawDescription: Blackshark AI — Software Engineers & Platform Engineers Blackshark AI | Software Engineers & Platform Engineers | Full-time | Austria or Remote EU Hours | VISA sponsorship available We build geospatial AI infrastructure. Our platform lets analysts train custom object and change detection models on satellite/aerial/drone imagery in minutes, then reconstructs 3D terrain from those detections. We just shipped a planetary-scale simulation platform with Lockheed Martin powered by Unreal Engine. If you want to work on distributed systems that run in a data center one day and an edge laptop the next, we have interesting problems. Our training and inference infrastructure is processing trillions of pixels and we deliver real world impact for our customers across defense, intelligence, and local governments. Tech Stack: Python, Fast API, PyTorch, Postgres, Redis, Vue.js Infrastructure Stack: Kubernetes & Docker, Linux, AWS & Azure, Azure DevOps, Terraform, ELK, Prometheus & Grafana, ArgoCD & Helm Roles: Software Engineer - Frontend UI https://jobs.eu.lever.co/blackshark/5c596b85-5134-4601-be25-... This staff level engineering role is focused on a critical product challenge: allowing both technical or less-technically proficient users of n8n to turn AI powered automated workflows into something they can rely on every day. You’ll work on the orchestration layer between users, workflows, a

needsReview.rawDescription: Engineering Lead (TypeScript /Node.js) About Voodoo Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Role We’re looking for an Engineering Lead (TypeScript/Node.js) to join our Engineering & Data team. As an Engineering Lead, you'll combine strong individual technical contributions with team leadership. You'll be responsible for the technical direction of your squad, the growth of your engineers, and the delivery of high-impact projects. This is a hybrid IC/manager role — you'll still write code, but your leverage is through the team. Lead the technical direction and architecture for your squad's domain Drive design reviews, set coding standards, and ensure engineering excellence Own the full delivery of complex, cross-team technical initiatives Build, scale and operate Node.js/TypeScript backend services on AWS/EKS Define the infrastructure and reliability strategy for your team's systems Partner with Product and Data to translate business goals into technical roadmaps Grow engineers through 1:1s, code reviews, mentorship and technical coaching Identify systemic risks and drive improvements before they become incidents Be an ambassador for engineering culture: psychological safety, pragmatism, and craft Profile (MUST have) 7+ years of professional software engineering experience 2+ years of experience leading an engineering team (formal or informal) Expert-level proficiency in TypeScript

With more than $217 million in funding and 100,000+ organizations that believe we’re on to something, we're building performance and error monitoring tools that help companies like Disney, Microsoft, and Atlassian spend less time fixing bugs and more time building products. Sentry embraces a hybrid work model across our global hubs, with Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays set as in-office anchor days to encourage meaningful collaboration. If you're ready to leave the mundane behind and join a team that's shaping the tools used by millions of developers globally, we've got an opportunity for you at Sentry. This isn't your typical Senior Software Engineer position. As a key member of our growing JavaScript SDK team, you'll be at the forefront of innovation, working on everything from our cutting-edge SDKs for the React, Next.js, Vue, Nuxt, Hono, NestJS, and beyond. You won't just be maintaining code; you'll be pushing the boundaries of what's possible in developer tooling across the full spectrum of the modern JavaScript framework landscape. In this role you will Join our JavaScript SDK team and get ready to build the future. needsReview.title: Senior Fullstack Developer
needsReview.rawDescription: We are looking for new professionals to join Pareto's journey Pareto is a growing software company built around experienced professionals and a sharp focus on what delivers results. We currently have over 50 senior software professionals on our team, and we’re hiring more this year. We’re looking for an experienced fullstack developer who wants to work on challenging client projects across industries. What will you do? You will work on our clients’ product development, typically as a developer, occasionally as an architect or technical lead when the project calls for it. We deliver full projects and integrate into our clients’ teams. Projects span industries like technology, manufacturing, defense, process industry, energy, logistics, food production, healthcare, and the public sector. The common factor: complex systems that require broad technical expertise across the full stack. You’ll have direct influence on client projects, technology choices, and engineering practices. What we expect At least 8 years of experience in software development. You work across the full stack and take ownership of what you build. Interest in AI-assisted development is expected. Experience with tools like Claude, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, or similar is an advantage. We work AI-natively and expect our developers to do the same. Strong experience with modern frontend frameworks such as React or Vue, and solid backend skills in Node.js, Python, Java, .NET, or similar. Databases and integrations are familiar territory. Experience with cloud platforms, primarily Azure or AWS. Ability to work with clients. You can communicate technical decisions in business terms and adapt to different organizational contexts. High standards for code quality. Maintainability, testability, and DevOps practices are part of how you work every day. What we offer Salary based on your experience: 4500–6500 EUR/month. Comprehensive benefits: extensive occupational healthcare, leisure-time accident and travel insuran
